titleStmt.title: SII 37.379: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 379. (A.R. No. B 26 of 1941-42.) Akkala-Reḍḍipalle, Badvel Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the temple of Mallikārjuna on the Gōśṛingaparvata.
This is dated Śaka 1205, Svabhānu, Vaiśākha śu. 7, Monday, corresponding to 1283 A.D., April 5.

It records the construction of the Śiva temple for the merit of the king Tripurāridēva, by Gaurēśvarabāyammaṅgāru for the worship of god Gōśriṅgadēva therein and gift of lands made to brahmaṇas. It also refers to the river Malayavatī-Gaṅga flowing towards the west of Umāparvata, Śrīparvata and Himaparvata.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōm svasti śrī śubha śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1205 Aydava Agunēṁṭi svabābhā
nu saṁvatsarada vaiśākha sidha saptami sō
mavārāna svasti śrī manmahāmaṁḍa
ḷēśvara maṁḍaḷika brahmarākṣasa nā
yaka nārāyaṇa gaṁḍa peṁḍāru
calamettu gaṁḍa kī¨rttikāmni vallabha
tripurāridēva mahārājulu
prithivī rājyamusēyaṁgā
nu mahārājulakuṁbuṁṇya
mugānu gaurēśvara bāyaṁmmaṁ
gāru Ettiṁcina śivālyamu .
gōśriṁgadēvara Lines 13 to 15
ku Aṁgaraṁgabhō
bhōgānaku na Should have followed script.
Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānu I
cenu . dīnini Evvarainā sadha¨rmma
vu naḍapeḍadi naḍapakuṁnnanu gaṁ
gakaṟataṁ gavilaṁ jaṁpina dō
ṣānaṁ bōvuvāru . svadattāṁ para
dattaṁ vā . Ō harēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭivva¨rṣa
sahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kri
miḥ After some blank space, at the end ofna .

Ī yokkadēvabrāhmaṇa vrittulu sa
dha¨rmmavuna naḍapi puṇyamusēsēdi .
sāmaṁtanalle nārāyaṇasvāmi sī
sarakṣapālanalēbhūletyāṁbāmulā
mūla sāhaṇapāgāru rāyarā
hutta gommarāhuttu Lines 29
naku [tripurāridēva mahārājulku jellē
vaṭuvrittigānicce brā
hmalaku bhaktulaku śrī pa¨rvvata dakṣi
ṇa malayāvati gaṁga paścima
vāhini samīpa Umāpa¨rvvatamu
naṁdu gōśriṁgadēvara mahā
thānamu hima pa¨rvvatamu śrī
pavvatamu Umāpa¨rvvata
munaṁdu sēsina dānaphala
Akṣayaphalamu . svadattaṁ dvigu
ṇaṁpuṇyaṁ pū¨rvvadattānupālayā
pū¨rvvadattēnapaharēṇaṁ svada
taṁ niḥ phalaṁ bhavēt Ōṁnamaḥ śivāya
